content.text: Apply bugfix-3: Closed acceptance gaps by enforcing mandatory PostgreSQL locking checks in test flow, exposing missing attendance/inventory optional inputs in UI payloads, and improving frontend visual hierarchy/polish.

Closed acceptance gaps by enforcing mandatory PostgreSQL locking checks in test flow, exposing missing attendance/inventory optional inputs in UI payloads, and improving frontend visual hierarchy/polish.

Changes applied:
### PostgreSQL locking semantics in default verification path
- Updated dockerized test runner to execute backend fast suite first, then a mandatory PostgreSQL locking suite for concurrency/idempotency scenarios.
- Added explicit POSTGRES_TEST_DATABASE_URL injection for the PostgreSQL locking test stage.
- Changed backend test harness DB env setup from unconditional override to setdefault so explicit PostgreSQL URL can be honored when provided.
Files: fullstack/run-tests.sh, fullstack/backend/tests/conftest.py

### Attendance and inventory prompt-level UI completeness
- Added optional attendance inputs for nfc_tag, latitude, and longitude in both check-in and check-out forms.
- Wired new attendance fields into API payloads with optional pass-through semantics.
- Added optional expiry_date input to inventory receiving form and passed it through in receiving line payload.
Files: fullstack/frontend/src/views/app/AttendanceView.vue, fullstack/frontend/src/views/app/InventoryReceivingView.vue

### UI hierarchy and product polish
- Refined global design tokens and typography with stronger color hierarchy and layered page background.
- Improved top-nav, side-nav, card/panel depth, buttons, and table affordances to better fit enterprise retail cockpit expectations.
- Added subtle panel entry animation plus reduced-motion fallback for accessibility-conscious motion behavior.
Files: fullstack/frontend/src/style.css
